column1: # Verified 2026-07-04 via claude-in-chrome real browser automation against glazy.org and clayimco.com (Square Online store). See price_list_run_notes.md for methodology and per-material notes.

column8: 728 - 200 Mesh Silica (Sil-Co-Sil 90); full tier pricing: 1 lb $2.50, 5 lb $5.00, 10 lb $9.00, 25 lb $25.75, 50 lb $25.00 (50 lb is a bulk discount vs 25 lb)
724 - Gerstley Borate; full tier pricing: 1 lb $6.00, 5 lb $30.00, 10 lb $55.00, 25 lb $150.00, 50 lb bag $225.00 -- matches the glaze tech's 2026-07-04 quote of $225/bag exactly
711 - Nepheline Syenite A270; full tier pricing: 1 lb $2.50, 5 lb $5.00, 10 lb $9.00, 25 lb $31.25, 50 lb $32.00

703 - G200EU Potassium Feldspar; "Potassium Feldspar" is IMCO's term vs Glazy's "Potash Feldspar". Full tier pricing: 1 lb $3.00, 5 lb $7.00, 10 lb $13.00, 55.14 lb (25kg bag) $56.00 -- no 25/50 lb tier, largest size is a metric 25kg bag

706 - EPK Edgar Plastic Kaolin; found as "EPK" variant via Kaolin search. ALL tiers currently out of stock (1/5/10/25/50 lb all show "Out of stock"), prices are last-listed, not purchasable right now -- this affects BOTH Frogskin and "Giggin' for Salvation," flag for the glaze tech. Full tier pricing: 1 lb $12.99, 5 lb $115.00, 10 lb $130.00, 25 lb $535.00, 50 lb $400.00 (non-monotonic: 25 lb costs more than 50 lb)

25479 - Red Iron Oxide (Synthetic) 2563; synthetic variant, natural variant may be available separately. Full tier pricing: 1 lb $8.00, 5 lb $30.00, 10 lb $55.00, 25 lb $141.25, 50 lb $200.00, 100 lb $375.00 -- 100 lb is the best per-lb rate ($3.75/lb) and the true bulk tier, not 50 lb
747 - Wollastonite W30; also available as 745 W10 at $2.50-$9.00, different grade. Full tier pricing (W30): 1 lb $2.50, 5 lb $5.50, 10 lb $9.00, 25 lb $22.00, 50 lb $30.00
25884 - Titanium Dioxide Powder. Full tier pricing: 1 lb $8.00, 5 lb $35.00, 10 lb $62.50, 25 lb $155.00, 50 lb $231.00

26802 - Frit 3134; recipe says "Ferro Frit 3134" -- IMCO lists the same material without the "Ferro" manufacturer prefix. Full tier pricing: 1 lb $4.25, 5 lb $20.00, 10 lb $38.00, 25 lb $85.00, 50 lb $135.00 -- matches the glaze tech's 2026-07-04 quote of $135/#50 exactly. This is the flux substituted for Gerstley Borate in "Giggin' for Salvation."

710 - Marble Whiting (Calcium Carbonate); full tier pricing: 1 lb $2.50, 5 lb $5.00, 10 lb $9.00, 25 lb $24.25, 50 lb $15.00 -- 50 lb tier is cheaper than 25 lb, same non-monotonic bulk-discount pattern seen with Silica

763 - 325 Mesh Bentonite; recipe just says "Bentonite" with no grade specified, chose IMCO's standard/generic grade over the premium "Bentonite 200 Mesh API Grade (Volclay)" ($14-$600) -- flag for the glaze tech to confirm which grade "Giggin' for Salvation" actually uses. Full tier pricing: 1 lb $2.50, 5 lb $5.00, 10 lb $9.50, 25 lb $28.50, 50 lb $33.50
